policy: Prefer an enabled authoritative Codex provider; retain a namespaced, deterministic Muster fallback. Never install an upstream provider implicitly.

families.codex: Official Codex CLI and App plugin using the shared skills directory.
families.musterStrategy: Prefer the enabled superpowers plugin; keep the nine sp-* skills as collision-free fallbacks.

families.codex: Official marketplace and per-plugin manifests; make generate HARNESS=codex emits native skills and TOML agents.
families.musterStrategy: Prefer enabled unprefixed native skills; keep wsh-* skills and strict-model Muster profiles as collision-free fallbacks.

families.codex: The official installer generates Codex skills, TOML agents, runtime configuration, and optional user/project hooks.
families.musterStrategy: Prefer enabled official gsd-* skills. Rename the three bundled hand-adapted fallbacks to muster-gsd-* to prevent collisions.

families.codex: Native atomic-vault, atomic-vcs, and code-intelligence skills with user-config hooks.
families.musterStrategy: Do not replace Muster's clean-room role profiles: current Atomic is a provenance/VCS product, not the former role roster.

families.codex: Portable book-genesis-codex skill package with OpenAI agent metadata, pipeline manifest, prompts, and scoring references.
families.musterStrategy: Keep Muster's distinct shared book pipeline authoritative; use this source for drift research rather than replacement.

families.codex: Portable any-agent skill. Corroborating Codex-ready sources: avoid-ai-writing v3.15.0 at 500ff59006f19c27120c5ddbd9b56fc3d937b6bf and anti-ai-slop-writing at 63255f9bbb75a265dc5786a04535cd033f487756.
families.musterStrategy: Keep muster-humanizer and deterministic humanize-score because they synthesize multiple sources and add Muster-specific gates.

families.codex: Codex-aware CLI provider that spawns Codex in a read-only sandbox and isolated working directory; it is not a native Codex skill or plugin and documents residual absolute-path read risk for untrusted input.
families.musterStrategy: Treat as pinned research provenance only. Keep muster-humanizer deterministic and self-contained; never install, spawn, or route through StealthHumanizer implicitly.

families.codex: Native Codex plugin for full prompt evaluation workflows.
families.musterStrategy: Prefer enabled Promptfoo for its full workflow while retaining Muster Prompt Smith's offline lint/eval fallback.

families.codex: Eleven native orchestration skills and twenty shared deterministic pipeline definitions.
families.musterStrategy: The shared pipeline YAML remains authoritative; Codex wrappers call the bundled CLI and never duplicate routing logic.
